description: Fast, cost-free checks for the Rosellas chat contract, TRIZ activity, answer compactness, forbidden recommendations, and scenario-specific coverage.

scores.name: agent_engine_present
scores.description: The backend response includes the engine field.

scores.name: solution_card_present
scores.description: The backend response includes a side-panel solution card.

scores.name: triz_tool_trail_present
scores.description: The response or Langfuse observations show TRIZ search or matrix activity.

scores.name: answer_brief
scores.description: The chat answer stays under the scenario word limit.

scores.name: forbidden_solution_patterns_absent
scores.description: The answer avoids scenario-specific forbidden solution patterns.

scores.name: domain_criteria_coverage
scores.description: Fraction of scenario required criteria covered by keywords in the answer and solution card.

scores.name: positive_signal_coverage
scores.description: Fraction of scenario positive signals covered by keywords.

scores.name: deterministic_overall
scores.description: Weighted aggregate score. Passes at passThreshold.

scores.name: run_pass
scores.description: Run passes when run_average_deterministic is at least runPassThreshold.
